channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Lindsey Graham, US Senator Who Encouraged Trump For Iran War, Dies At 71

media:content.media:description: Lindsey Graham was a member of Donald Trump's Republican Party

item.description: Lindsey Graham was first elected to the United States Senate in 2002.
item.content:encoded: Lindsey Graham was first elected to the United States Senate in 2002.

item.title: Indian Missing, 10 Rescued After Iran Attacks Ship In Strait Of Hormuz

media:content.media:description: The Indian Embassy in Oman is closely monitoring the situation

item.description: India described the continued attacks on ships as deeply worrisome and called for an immediate de-escalation in the Middle East.
item.content:encoded: India described the continued attacks on ships as deeply worrisome and called for an immediate de-escalation in the Middle East.

item.title: Iran Shuts Hormuz After Attack On 'Unauthorised' Ship, US Begins New Strikes

media:content.media:description: US is demanding that Iran publicly state it will stop attacks on ships in the strait

item.description: Iran said the Strait of Hormuz was closed "until further notice" and until "the end of US interference in this region."
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1126233/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>Iran said the Strait of Hormuz was closed "until further notice" and until "the end of US interference in this region."

item.title: Tourist Injured After Bison Tosses Him 8 Feet Into The Air At Yellowstone Park

media:content.media:description: The man was walking with his young grandson when the attack unfolded.

item.description: The bison hooked him with one of its horns and flung him high into the air before he landed heavily on the ground.
item.content:encoded: The bison hooked him with one of its horns and flung him high into the air before he landed heavily on the ground.

item.title: How Terrorist Groups Are Using AI To Plan Attacks And Make Bombs

media:content.media:description: Representational Image

item.description: Some terrorist groups, including Al Qaeda, Islamic State, and Boko Haram, are using AI tools to help plan attacks and make explosives.
item.content:encoded: Some terrorist groups, including Al Qaeda, Islamic State, and Boko Haram, are using AI tools to help plan attacks and make explosives.

item.title: "Scam Altman" vs "Elon Is Obsessed With Me": Musk And OpenAI CEO Clash Again

media:content.media:description: The latest exchange is part of a long-running public feud between Elon Musk and Sam Altman

item.description: Elon Musk, who co-founded OpenAI in 2015 before leaving the company, has repeatedly accused OpenAI of abandoning its original nonprofit mission.
item.content:encoded: Elon Musk, who co-founded OpenAI in 2015 before leaving the company, has repeatedly accused OpenAI of abandoning its original nonprofit mission.

item.title: How OpenAI Engineer's 'LOL' Moment Triggered Legal Fight With Apple

media:content.media:description: Apple filed a lawsuit against OpenAI on Friday

item.description: Apple has sued OpenAI and two former employees, alleging misappropriation of its trade secrets to benefit the ChatGPT-owner's foray into consumer hardware.
item.content:encoded: Apple has sued OpenAI and two former employees, alleging misappropriation of its trade secrets to benefit the ChatGPT-owner's foray into consumer hardware.

item.title: Ex-Pentagon Official Claims US Has Secret Photos Showing Monolith-Like Structures On Moon

media:content.media:description: His latest remarks come amid continued public interest in declassified US government records on UAPs.

item.description: Elizondo said the photographs appear to show large structures on the lunar surface featuring distinct right-angle cuts.
item.content:encoded: Elizondo said the photographs appear to show large structures on the lunar surface featuring distinct right-angle cuts.

item.title: 3 Andhra Tourists Killed In Vietnam Boat Tragedy, State Begins Op To Bring Bodies Back

media:content.media:description: An Andhra resident was also injured in the Vietnam boat tragedy (Representational)

item.description: A speedboat carrying 32 Indian tourists overturned during a leisure excursion on Saturday, leaving 15 Indian nationals dead.
item.content:encoded: A speedboat carrying 32 Indian tourists overturned during a leisure excursion on Saturday, leaving 15 Indian nationals dead.

item.title: US Hits 140 Iranian Targets After Hormuz Closure, Tehran Strikes UAE, Qatar

media:content.media:description: The latest strikes threatened an already fragile interim deal aimed at ending Iran war

item.description: Iran announced the closure of the Strait of Hormuz after firing on a vessel it said was taking an "unauthorised route".
item.content:encoded: Iran announced the closure of the Strait of Hormuz after firing on a vessel it said was taking an "unauthorised route".

item.title: Hyderabad Student Missing In Finland For Over 2 Months Found Dead In Sea

media:content.media:description: Manideep Reddy was studying at Lappeenranta-Lahti University of Technology

item.description: The family said that Manideep Reddy, 18, spoke with his mother shortly before he went missing in Helsinki.
item.content:encoded: The family said that Manideep Reddy, 18, spoke with his mother shortly before he went missing in Helsinki.

item.title: Vietnam Boat Tragedy Updates: Vietnam Orders Probe After Boat Tragedy Kills 15 Indian Tourists

media:content.media:description: Vietnam Boat Tragedy: At least 15 Indians, including 13 men and 2 women, were killed in the incident

item.description: Vietnam Boat Tragedy Updates: The speedboat was ferrying 32 Indian tourists, three crew members and one Vietnamese tour guide from May Rut Ngoai Islet to An Thoi International Port
item.content:encoded: Vietnam Boat Tragedy Updates: The speedboat was ferrying 32 Indian tourists, three crew members and one Vietnamese tour guide from May Rut Ngoai Islet to An Thoi International Port

item.title: Trump's Modification Of Endangered Species Act Will Allow Harm To Habitats

media:content.media:description: The Endangered Species Act is credited with saving the bald eagle and other iconic species.

item.description: The Department of the Interior and the Department of Commerce framed the change as returning the law to its original intent, ending what they called years of overreach.
item.content:encoded: The Department of the Interior and the Department of Commerce framed the change as returning the law to its original intent, ending what they called years of overreach.

item.title: 2 Dead, Several Hurt In Shooting At Canada Festival, Attacker On The Run

media:content.media:description: "Please avoid the area immediately and follow all directions from police," Toronto police said.

item.description: Local media reported the shooting took place in an area where a salsa festival was being held.
item.content:encoded: Local media reported the shooting took place in an area where a salsa festival was being held.

item.title: Indian-Origin Google Techie Shot Dead By Husband At US Home, Son Injured

media:content.media:description: Sheetal Wrzesien was an engineering leader at Google with more than two decades of experience

item.description: The accused, 56-year-old Kirk B Wrzesien, was arrested on Tuesday night at the family residence in Cobb County, near Atlanta. He is currently being held without bond at the Cobb County Adult Detention Centre
item.content:encoded: The accused, 56-year-old Kirk B Wrzesien, was arrested on Tuesday night at the family residence in Cobb County, near Atlanta. He is currently being held without bond at the Cobb County Adult Detention Centre

item.title: US-Iran War Live Updates: After US Strikes Iran, Missile Alerts Sounded In UAE, Qatar, Bahrain

media:content.media:description: The US also revoked a sanctions waiver for Iranian oil.

item.description: Iran-US War News LIVE: The US military has hit a variety of military sites and port facilities after blaming Iran for targeting several merchant vessels off the coast of Oman, sparking Iranian fire then as well.
item.content:encoded: Iran-US War News LIVE: The US military has hit a variety of military sites and port facilities after blaming Iran for targeting several merchant vessels off the coast of Oman, sparking Iranian fire then as well.

item.title: "Unimaginable Tragedy": Lava Mobiles As Indian Associates Killed In Vietnam

media:content.media:description: 14 of the victims were channel partners of Lava Mobile, the company confirmed.

item.description: The victims include 10 persons from Tamil Nadu, three from Andhra Pradesh and two from Kerala, the Indian Embassy in Hanoi said.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1126247/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>The victims include 10 persons from Tamil Nadu, three from Andhra Pradesh and two from Kerala, the Indian Embassy in Hanoi said.

item.title: Iran Officials Admit To "Mistake" After Attacks On Ships In Hormuz: Report

media:content.media:description: White House wants Iran to acknowledge that the attacks violated the ceasefire

item.description: According to the officials, Tehran blamed the incidents on an "errant" faction of hardliners that allegedly acted to derail ongoing negotiations.
item.content:encoded: According to the officials, Tehran blamed the incidents on an "errant" faction of hardliners that allegedly acted to derail ongoing negotiations.

item.title: US Lawmaker Ro Khanna Detained By Israeli Settlers During West Bank Visit

media:content.media:description: Most countries and the United Nations regard Israeli settlements in the West Bank as illegal.

item.description: Khanna is the second Democrat considering a White House bid to visit the region this week.
item.content:encoded: Khanna is the second Democrat considering a White House bid to visit the region this week.

item.title: 15 Indian Tourists Killed As Boat Overturns In Vietnam

media:content.media:description: The embassy added that local authorities are working to establish the exact details of the incident.

item.description: Search and rescue operations are underway, and the Indian mission has set up control rooms to assist those affected.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1126023/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>Search and rescue operations are underway, and the Indian mission has set up control rooms to assist those affected.
